project.title: Exosome proteomics under hypoxia
project.projectDescription: TMT multiplexed exosome samples, SEC purified from cells cultured under Normoxia and Hypoxia
project.sampleProcessingProtocol: Samples were TCA precipitated and resuspended in 2% Sodium deoxycholate, 100mM EPPS pH 8.2, 10mM TCEP and 40mM Chloro-N,N-diethylacetamide. After incubation for 10min at 95°C, samples were diluted with 1 volume 100mM EPPS and LysC and Trypsin were added in a wt/wt ratio of 1:100. Samples were digested overnight at 37°C, followed by TMT labelling (1µL TMT reagent per sample) for 1 hour at room temperature. Labelling was quenched by addition of hydroxylamine to a final concentration of 0.5%. Samples were combined and purified by SDB-RPS (3M Millipore) stage-tip cleanup. For cleanup, samples were mixed with 5 volumes Isopropanol/1% TFA and loaded directly on stage-tips. Samples were washed with 200µL Isopropanol/1% TFA and a subsequent wash with 200µL 0.2% TFA in water. Elution was performed using 80% acetonitrile/5% Ammonium hydroxide. Eluates were dried and resuspended in 2% acetonitrile/1% formic acid for LC-MS.
project.dataProcessingProtocol: Samples were separated on an Easy nLC 1200 (ThermoFisher Scientific) and a 22 cm long, 75 µm ID fused-silica column, which had been packed in house with 1.9 µm C18 particles (ReproSil-Pur, Dr. Maisch), and kept at 45°C using an integrated column oven (Sonation). Peptides were eluted by a non-linear gradient from 5-38% acetonitrile over 190 min and directly sprayed into a QExactive HF mass spectrometer equipped with a nanoFlex ion source (ThermoFisher Scientific) at a spray voltage of 2.3 kV. Full scan MS spectra (350-1400 m/z) were acquired at a resolution of 120,000 at m/z 200, a maximum injection time of 80 ms and an AGC target value of 3 x 106. Up to 20 most intense peptides per full scan were isolated using a 1 Th window and fragmented using higher energy collisional dissociation (normalized collision energy of 35). MS/MS spectra were acquired with a resolution of 45,000 at m/z 200, a maximum injection time of 80 ms and an AGC target value of 1 x 105. Ions with charge states of 1 and > 6 as well as ions with unassigned charge states were not considered for fragmentation. Dynamic exclusion was set to 20 s to minimize repeated sequencing of already acquired precursors. Raw files were analyzed using Proteome Discoverer (PD) 2.4 software (ThermoFisher Scientific). Files were recalibrated using the Homo Sapiens SwissProt database (TaxID:9606, version 2018-11-21) with methionine oxidation (+15.995) as dynamic modification and Chloro-N,N-diethylacetamide (Cys,+113.084), TMT6 (N-terminal, +229.1629) and TMT6 (+229.1629) at lysines as fixed modifications. Spectra were selected using default settings and database searches performed using SequestHT node in PD. Database searches were performed against trypsin digested Homo Sapiens SwissProt database and FASTA files of common contaminants (`contaminants.fasta` provided with MaxQuant) for quality control. Fixed modifications were set as TMT6 at the N-terminus and chloro-N,N-diethylacetamide at cysteine residues. As dynamic modifications TMT6 (K), TMT6+K8 (K, +237.177), Arg10 (R, +10.008) and methionine oxidation were set. At the protein terminus acetylation (N-term, +42.011), methionine-loss (M, -131.040) and methionine-loss + acetylation (M, -89.030) were set as dynamic modifications. After search, posterior error probabilities were calculated and PSMs filtered using Percolator using default settings. Consensus Workflow for reporter ion quantification was performed with default settings, except the minimal signal-to-noise ratio was set to 5. Results were then exported to Excel files for further processing.

references.referenceLine: Geßner A, Koch B, Klann K, Fuhrmann DC, Farmand S, Schubert R, Münch C, Geiger H, Baer PC. Characterization of Extracellular Vesicles from Preconditioned Human Adipose-Derived Stromal/Stem Cells. Int J Mol Sci. 2021 22(6)

Characteristics[OrganismPart]: adipose tissue obtained from nine female donors undergoing cosmetic liposuction
Characteristics[NumberOfSamples]: 46 cell culture media samples were gathered from nine different ASC isolations.
Characteristics[Label]: tandem mass tag (1 µL reagent per sample)
Comment[FractionIdentifier]: fractions 7–12 containing extracellular vesicles were pooled
Comment[Instrument]: QExactive HF mass spectrometer equipped with a nanoFlex ion source
Comment[AcquisitionMethod]: Full scan MS spectra (350–1400 m/z) were obtained, and the 20 most intense peptides were isolated and fragmented by higher-energy collisional dissociation.
